invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破135（基于ATR 1.2506和近期支撑）或融资费率Z-Score升至-50%以上（显示空头压力缓解），则失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 135 (based on ATR 1.2506 and recent support) or funding rate Z-Score rises above -50% (indicating short pressure easing).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破0.14（基于ATR 0.0014和近期支撑）或融资费率Z-Score升至-50%以上（显示空头压力缓解），则失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 0.14 (based on ATR 0.0014 and recent support) or funding rate Z-Score rises above -50% (indicating short pressure easing).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破3150（基于ATR 18.1863和近期支撑）或融资费率Z-Score升至-50%以上（显示空头压力缓解），则失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 3150 (based on ATR 18.1863 and recent support) or funding rate Z-Score rises above -50% (indicating short pressure easing).
